oc_cron_disabled_transient.description: Cron job transiently disabled, likely from a failed run or timeout

oc_cron_stuck_missed.reversibility: No side effects -- run was already missed
oc_cron_stuck_missed.description: Cron job missed its scheduled run window

oc_intake_dir_missing.description: Skill intake directory missing, blocking inter-skill signal delivery

oc_journal_dir_missing.description: Skill journal directory missing, blocking journal writes

oc_skill_data_dir_missing.description: Skill data directory or config.json missing, skill uninitialized

oc_jsonl_oversized.description: JSONL log file exceeded max_records threshold, needs rotation

oc_jsonl_malformed_lines.reversibility: Move .error lines back to original file
oc_jsonl_malformed_lines.description: JSONL file contains malformed JSON lines blocking parsing

oc_gateway_token_missing.description: Gateway authentication token missing or invalid

oc_oauth_token_expiring.auto_fix: OAuth refresh (only when token still valid, expiry <= 12h)
oc_oauth_token_expiring.reversibility: Token was valid before refresh -- no rollback needed
oc_oauth_token_expiring.description: OAuth token approaching expiry, proactive refresh needed

oc_background_task_missing.auto_fix: Register missing cron or heartbeat entry per SKILL.md declaration
oc_background_task_missing.description: Declared background task not found in cron registry or HEARTBEAT.md

oc_skill_uninitialized.auto_fix: Create storage dirs, default config.json, empty JSONL files
oc_skill_uninitialized.description: Installed skill has no data directory, config, or journal directory

oc_gateway_process_down.description: Gateway process is not running -- requires manual restart

oc_port_collision.description: Port 18789 in use by another process -- requires manual resolution

oc_systemd_linger_disabled.description: systemd linger not enabled -- background services will not persist across logout

oc_node_version_mismatch.description: Node.js version does not meet OpenClaw requirements
